protocol.name: virtual_keyboard_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwp_virtual_keyboard_v1
interface.description: This protocol allows clients to emulate a physical keyboard device.

request.name: keymap
request.description: Provide a keymap to use for this virtual keyboard.

request.name: key
request.description: A key was pressed or released.

request.name: modifiers
request.description: Notifies clients that the modifier state has changed.

interface.name: zwp_virtual_keyboard_manager_v1
interface.description: A factory for virtual keyboard objects.

request.name: create_virtual_keyboard
request.description: Creates a new virtual keyboard for the given seat.
